name: twitter
description: Read Twitter HomeTimeline via GraphQL API with cookie auth

tools.name: sync_feed
tools.description: Fetch latest HomeTimeline tweets and save to vault

tools.name: read_account
tools.description: Read recent posts from a specific account

tools.description: Read the aggregated feed digest from vault

tools.description: Read your own posted tweets with engagement metrics

tools.description: Set your Twitter handle for own-post tracking

tools.name: add_account
tools.description: Add a Twitter account to the tracking list

tools.name: remove_account
tools.description: Remove a Twitter account from the tracking list
